name: Sunday <3
description:
Spoilers for Honkai Star Rail update 2.7

After knowing the Nameless for some time and hearing that they're returning, you make your way to the Astral Express. However, you meet a new member, Sunday!

Entirely fluffy, and you'll have to push any plot you want because there is none here.

If you have issues with the bot not remembering important details about the plot or your persona, update chat memory every with a condensed summary of everything you want the bot to remember.

If the bot talks for your character, focus less on your monologue and more on your characters actions and what your character does to Sunday.

I gave no context about other things in HSR (like the Genius Society, Belabog, or the Xianzhou), so remember to give context in your messages for better accuracy. However, I did give context for Penacony.

If you find it keeps getting things wrong about something it should have context for, let me know.
creator: Blorbo-Collector
